testcase.name: test_eight_personas_present

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 8 Riverbend personas, got 10 assert 10 == 8 + where 10 = len([{'address': '1124 SE Ankeny St, Portland, OR, 97214', 'address_details': {'city': 'Portland', 'country': 'USA', 'line1': '1124 SE Ankeny St', 'line2': None, ...}, 'admin': {'internal_flags': None, 'mrn': None, 'primary_provider_id': '29da6566-a752-4c36-b524-3291dd698cb9', 'referral_source': 'Google search', ...}, 'case_details': None, ...}, {'address': '2208 NE Alberta St, Portland, OR, 97211', 'address_details': {'city': 'Portland', 'country': 'USA', 'line1': '2208 NE Alberta St', 'line2': None, ...}, 'admin': {'internal_flags': None, 'mrn': None, 'primary_provider_id': '29da6566-a752-4c36-b524-3291dd698cb9', 'referral_source': 'Referred by PCP (Dr. Amin)', ...}, 'case_details': None, ...}, {'address': '842 NW Lovejoy St, Apt 4B, Portland, OR 97209', 'address_details': {'city': 'Portland', 'country': 'USA', 'line1': '842 NW Lovejoy St', 'line2': 'Apt 4B', ...}, 'admin': {'internal_flags': None, 'mrn': None, 'primary_provider_id': '29da6566-a752-4c36-b524-3291dd698cb9', 'referral_source': 'Employee demo account', ...}, 'case_details': None, ...}, testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_riverbend_demo_sanitation.py:244: in test_eight_personas_present assert len(rb_personas) == 8, f"Expected 8 Riverbend personas, got {len(rb_personas)}" E
